listing.title: WEB-CAD
listing.tagline: Parametric CAD in the browser, driven by Claude Code
listing.description: WEB-CAD is a browser-based experimental parametric CAD workbench. This MCP server lets Claude Code agents dispatch geometry verbs (walls, slabs, NURBS surfaces, booleans), inspect the scene, and capture viewport screenshots — with a dedicated slot system for isolated parallel sessions.
features: 323 geometry verbs across 21 categories (architectural, NURBS, boolean, annotation, …)
Isolated slot sessions — multiple parallel WEB-CAD tabs with per-slot IDB state
Viewport screenshot capture with browser-lock protocol
Scene inspection (list all objects, UUIDs, layers)
requirements: Chromium or Chrome with remote debugging enabled on port 9222 (for default :9222 mode)
WEB-CAD page open at https://wordingone.github.io/WEB-CAD/ (or slots launch their own dedicated browser)

slashCommands.description: List all objects in the active WEB-CAD scene
Capture the WEB-CAD viewport as a PNG
N/A — WEB-CAD is a browser application. Rhino launching does not apply. Use the RhinoMCP plugin for Rhino integration.
N/A — WEB-CAD is a browser application. Use the RhinoMCP plugin for Rhino integration.
